35-year-old Christian Murrow received a total of nine charges, including three counts of assault and battery with a dangerous weapon, three counts of assault and battery upon a police officer, one count of assault and or battery on an emergency medical technician, one count of malicious injury to property, and one count of obstructing an officer. His bond was set at $75,000. After entering a guilty plea, Christian was sentenced to a term of five years incarceration on each count, to be served concurrently in the Department of Corrections, with credit granted for time already served.
